title: NTICycleStateV1
description: Per-season-run NTI cycle state. Tracks active surface, per-surface seal status, and NTI-level exhaustion counters. Stored at {activeRunPath}/nti_state.json. Distinct from season_state.exhaustionCounters (orchestrator end-of-batch level).
$comment: Design authority: Research Agent Execution Roadmap Phase 2.5. No contract formally defines these fields — this schema was authored to fill the documented gap. Governing behaviour contracts: NTI-CYCLE-EXECUTION.md (surface rotation, sealing, exhaustion guard). Storage: parallel to state.json in active run directory.

currentSurface.description: The NTI time surface currently active for extraction. One of the 8 Tier A surface tokens from EVENT_ENUM_REGISTRY_V1. Null until first surface is assigned.

surfaceSealStatus.description: Per-surface seal status. false = active (eligible for rotation). true = sealed (removed from future extraction rotation per NTI-CYCLE-EXECUTION.md Section VII).

exhaustionCounters.description: NTI-audit-level exhaustion counters per surface. Incremented by NTI audit logic on exhaustion detection events. Distinct from season_state.exhaustionCounters (orchestrator end-of-batch tracking). Per NTI-CYCLE-EXECUTION.md Section VIII: exhaustion operates on structural distinctness.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last write. Operational metadata — does not participate in canonical identity.
